# Io — portal submission

**Title:** Splat

**Tagline:** Grow by eating, dodge the bigger blobs, top the arena.

**Controls:** Drag to move (or arrow keys / WASD on desktop).

**Tags:** arcade, io, casual, mobile, highscore

**Description:**
Drag your blob around the arena, gobbling pellets and anything smaller than you while dodging blobs big enough to swallow you whole. Bots wander, flee bigger threats, and chase easy prey just like you do — the bigger you get, the slower you move, so staying on top takes real strategy. Quick rounds, instant respawn, climb the rank counter.

## Where to upload
- itch.io  (Kind: HTML, check 'mobile friendly', set viewport ~520x720, upload io.zip)
- CrazyGames developer portal (HTML5; add their SDK for rev-share before submitting)
- GameDistribution / Playgama Bridge (one build to many portals)

> Reminder: integrate a portal SDK's rewarded-video before monetized submission; itch.io accepts the plain zip as-is for the first real-world signal.
